parties.name: LE, ANH-TUAN 357 ARBALLO DRIVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ:Carolyn Gold, Clerks: P. Dias/M. Vallejo, CSR: Robert Balian.
Appearances:
Plaintiff present with counsel, Alan Horwitz, Esq. Represented by Margarita Gonzales, Property Manqager.
Anh-Tuan Le, Defendant present in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record without the presence of the clerk.(Clerk was on the telephone trying to get a court reporter).
Property address: 357 Arballo Dr. SF, CA 94132.
Pro-Tem Junge wrote on settlement conference hearing sheet: To vacate 23/Jun/03 and give full release. Land Lord pays $4,500.00 combination of waived rent, security deposit and cash.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
